name: GAW Check Cashing
description_short: GAW Check Cashing is a Baltimore-based check cashing service located at 225 N Eutaw St. Contact them at 410-528-8808 for check cashing and related financial services.
description_long:
GAW Check Cashing operates as a check cashing business in Baltimore, Maryland, positioned in the heart of the city at 225 N Eutaw St. The business is listed on BaltimoreDirect.us, a local business directory network that serves the Baltimore area and surrounding regions. According to their profile, the company is verified as an authentic business member with content published directly by the owner.

The company offers traditional check cashing services, which falls squarely within the check-cashing category. While their website presence is limited to a basic directory listing, they provide the core financial service of converting checks into cash for customers in the Baltimore area. The business maintains a phone line at 410-528-8808 for inquiries and service requests.

GAW Check Cashing distinguishes itself by maintaining a physical location in downtown Baltimore and being registered as a verified business on the BaltimoreDirect.us network. Their listing indicates they are a local, established business that serves the immediate Baltimore community rather than operating as an online-only or regional chain.

However, it is important to note that the website provides minimal operational information. All listed hours of operation show the business as closed seven days a week, which raises significant concerns about current operational status. The lack of detailed service descriptions, fee schedules, or operating hours makes it difficult to assess their full service offerings or reliability. Prospective customers should contact them directly to confirm current business operations and service availability.
pros: Located in downtown Baltimore at 225 N Eutaw St., providing convenient physical access for local customers
Verified authentic business member on BaltimoreDirect.us directory
Listed as a local Baltimore business serving the immediate community
Profile published and managed directly by the owner, indicating official representation
cons: All hours of operation listed as closed every day of the week (Sun-Sat), raising serious questions about current operational status
Minimal website information provided - no details on fees, service types, or operating procedures
No information about additional services (money orders, wire transfers, bill payment) despite being in the check-cashing category
Contact email appears to be a generic mailinator address (joeldeuts@mailinator.com), suggesting unprofessional business communication setup
No customer reviews, testimonials, or ratings visible on the listing
best_for: Baltimore residents who need basic check cashing services in the downtown area
Customers seeking a local, established check cashing business with a physical location
diagnosis: GAW Check Cashing appears to be a check cashing business in Baltimore, but critical operational concerns exist: all listed hours show the business as closed every day of the week. Before attempting to use their services, customers must call 410-528-8808 to confirm the business is currently operational. The minimal website information and questionable hours suggest either outdated listing information or possible business closure.
